_comment: Academic Studio 'Recommended Plugins' catalog (offline snapshot). Live version served at https://academic-studio.com/plugins.json; the app fetches it on startup and in Run Setup, so curating plugins = edit site/plugins.json + push (GitHub Pages deploys site/**). Each entry is declarative data — a git source installed as a Claude skill via `npx skills add`, plus optional pip libs — the app never executes shell text from this file. Keep this snapshot in sync with site/plugins.json.

packages.label: Finance Data — fetch market & economic data (Yahoo Finance, FRED, SEC EDGAR, Ken French, FinnHub, Financial Modeling Prep) and save as CSV
packages.author: Kerry Back
packages.name: finance-data

packages.label: litdb — private, searchable library of your research papers: add PDFs and search their full text by keyword & meaning, find new work (OpenAlex/Semantic Scholar), track citations, export BibTeX; optional Zotero
packages.author: Kerry Back
packages.name: litdb

packages.label: Slide Deck — build themed reveal.js/Quarto presentations, export to PDF/PPTX/PNG
packages.author: Kerry Back
packages.name: slides

packages.label: Voiceover Builder — narrate a PDF slide deck into an MP4 video + transcript (Claude writes the narration, ElevenLabs voices it)
packages.author: Kerry Back
packages.name: voiceover

packages.label: Econ Slides — turn an economics paper into a Beamer talk with a timed speaker script
packages.author: Lu Han (OpenEconAI)
packages.name: econ-slides

packages.label: Econ Writing — write, edit, restructure, and audit economics papers with field-aware guidance
packages.author: Lu Han (OpenEconAI)
packages.name: econ-write

packages.label: Econ Paper Review — a rigorous referee report and prioritized revision plan for an economics paper
packages.author: Lu Han (OpenEconAI)
packages.name: econ-review
